_comment: Rise of the Witch-king (LTR, {2}{B}{G} sorcery). Each player sacrifices a creature of their choice; if you sacrificed, you may return another permanent card from your graveyard to the battlefield. Both sides have exactly one creature so the sacrifices auto-resolve (no decision pause). The player's graveyard pre-seeds a Mirkwood Spider for the reanimation rider to bring back.
